mano_cua.result_summary: /api-docs 正常显示项目 API 文档（cats 端点）。/api-docs/api-docs 返回 404（正确）。但 /api-docs/LICENSE 返回 200 并成功下载了 Apache 2.0 LICENSE 文件（11.1KB），swagger-ui-dist 包目录下的 LICENSE 文件被作为静态资源暴露。同样 /api-docs/package.json 也返回了 swagger-ui 的 package.json 内容。不必要的静态资源被暴露，存在安全隐患。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Confirmed: /api-docs/LICENSE successfully serves and downloads the Apache LICENSE file (11.1 KB downloaded twice) rather than returning 404. This is an unnecessary static resource exposure - swagger-ui-dist package files like LICENSE and package.json are being served alongside the Swagger UI, which is a security issue.
